name: io.github.cyanheads/workflows-mcp-server
description: Store, query, and create YAML workflow playbooks for LLM agents.

environmentVariables.name: WORKFLOWS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute or relative path to the workflows root directory.

environmentVariables.name: GLOBAL_INSTRUCTIONS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the global instructions markdown file. Derives from WORKFLOWS_DIR when not set.

environmentVariables.name: WATCHER_DEBOUNCE_MS
environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds to debounce filesystem change events before rebuilding the index.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: WORKFLOWS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute or relative path to the workflows root directory.

environmentVariables.name: GLOBAL_INSTRUCTIONS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the global instructions markdown file. Derives from WORKFLOWS_DIR when not set.

environmentVariables.name: WATCHER_DEBOUNCE_MS
environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds to debounce filesystem change events before rebuilding the index.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
